text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF National Death Index Segment Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 2.6 11 

096 = Cholelithiasis and other disorders 
of gallbladder (K80–K82) 

097 = Nephritis, nephrotic syndrome, 
and nephrosis (N00–N07, N17–
N19, N25–N27) 

098 = Acute and rapidly progressive 
nephritic and nephrotic 
syndrome (N00–N01, N04) 

099 = Chronic glomerulonephritis, 
nephritis and nephropathy not 
specified as acute or chronic, 
and renal sclerosis unspecified
